issues.description: Text contains '[Your Turn]' which requires duration:'DuringYourTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'. This is a duration violation.
Action type should be 'GiveCostReduction' or similar cost-reduction mechanic, not 'PowerBoost'. PowerBoost modifies power/ATK, not cost.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] [Your Turn] Give all of your opponent's Characters −1 cost.
